cases.title: TS-10: Instructor creates session with room GPS saved in Draft state
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with ClassAssignment for class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101
Reference class and subject IDs are known
Room coordinates fixture: latitude 10.762622, longitude 106.660172
steps: POST /sessions with classId, subjectId, title, roomName Phòng A201, roomLatitude 10.762622, roomLongitude 106.660172, gpsRadiusMeters 100, and future scheduledStart
Assert HTTP status 201 Created
Assert response body status is Draft and roomLatitude, roomLongitude, gpsRadiusMeters match request
GET /sessions/:sessionId with Instructor session and verify persisted GPS fields
cases.expected: Session persisted in Draft state with configured room GPS and default 100 m radius per AC-04a and FR-04

cases.title: SessionService.create persists Draft session with GPS coordinates in Postgres transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
session-management module SessionService is wired to SessionRepository
Instructor context with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101 exists
steps: Invoke SessionService.create with valid DTO including roomLatitude, roomLongitude, gpsRadiusMeters 100
Query sessions table by returned sessionId within transaction scope
Verify status column is Draft, room_latitude and room_longitude match input, gps_radius_meters is 100
cases.expected: Exactly one session row committed with status Draft and GPS fields stored; no attendance or QR scheduler side effects on create

cases.title: POST /sessions returns 201 Created with Session DTO in Draft status
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set with assignment to target class-subject
Valid session creation payload per API design §5.2 is prepared
steps: Send POST /sessions with Content-Type application/json and full request body
Assert HTTP status 201 Created
Assert response body contains id, classId, subjectId, status Draft, roomName, roomLatitude, roomLongitude, gpsRadiusMeters, scheduledStart
Assert response body does not contain openedAt or closedAt timestamps
cases.expected: HTTP 201 Created with Session DTO envelope per API design §5.2; status Draft confirms session not yet active

cases.title: TS-11: Open Draft session without valid room GPS returns 422 RoomGpsRequired
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns a Draft session created without roomLatitude and roomLongitude (null coordinates)
Session class-subject is within instructor assignment scope
steps: POST /sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode RoomGpsRequired with Vietnamese message requiring room GPS configuration
GET /sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Draft to Active transition blocked per AC-04b and BR-07; session status unchanged; error surfaces RoomGpsRequired

cases.title: SessionService.open rejects Draft session with missing GPS and preserves Draft state
preconditions: Draft session row exists with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) for session missing coordinates
Capture thrown domain exception with errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Query sessions table for sessionId and read status column
cases.expected: beforeState Draft, afterState Draft; RoomGpsRequired thrown; no openedAt set and no attendance bootstrap triggered

cases.title: TS-12: Cancel Draft session transitions to terminal Cancelled status
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns a Draft session with valid GPS configured
Session has not been opened
steps: POST /sessions/:sessionId/cancel with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body status is Cancelled
GET /sessions/:sessionId and verify status Cancelled with no openedAt timestamp
cases.expected: Session transitions from Draft to Cancelled terminal state per AC-04c; no attendance records finalized

cases.title: SessionService.cancel transitions Draft session to Cancelled in database
preconditions: Draft session row exists in PostgreSQL test database
SessionService.cancel invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Record beforeState as Draft from sessions table
Invoke SessionService.cancel(sessionId)
Query sessions table and read status column
Verify no attendance_records rows were created or updated for this session
cases.expected: beforeState Draft, afterState Cancelled; terminal state persisted; no attendance finalize side effects

cases.title: POST /sessions/:sessionId/cancel returns 200 with status Cancelled
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Draft sessionId owned by instructor is known
steps: Send POST /sessions/:sessionId/cancel with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains sessionId and status Cancelled
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with updated Session DTO per API design §5.6; status Cancelled confirms terminal cancellation

cases.title: Student denied POST /sessions with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Valid session creation payload is prepared
Student role lacks session:write permission per roles matrix §2.2
steps: POST /sessions with valid creation body using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify no new session row created in database
cases.expected: Student cannot create sessions per roles-permissions §2.3; HTTP 403 with no session persisted

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /sessions without session:write override
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Admin has session:read institution-wide but no default session:write per MVP policy
Valid session creation payload is prepared
steps: POST /sessions with valid body using TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no session row created
cases.expected: Admin cannot create sessions in MVP default policy; access denied with 403 Forbidden

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /sessions for unassigned class-subject with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated with ClassAssignment only for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Class HESD-02 and subject SWE-101 exist
Instructor lacks assignment to HESD-02
steps: POST /sessions with classId for HESD-02 and subjectId for SWE-101 using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden
Verify no session row created for HESD-02
cases.expected: Session creation blocked for out-of-scope class assignment; HTTP 403 with zero session data persisted

cases.title: POST /sessions with roomLatitude out of range returns 422 OutOfRange
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with valid class-subject assignment
Session payload sets roomLatitude to 91 (exceeds −90..90 bounds)
steps: POST /sessions with roomLatitude 91 and otherwise valid fields
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed with field error code OutOfRange for roomLatitude
Verify no session row created
cases.expected: Invalid coordinate rejected per API design §5.2 validation; HTTP 422 with OutOfRange field error; no Draft session persisted

cases.title: gpsRadiusMeters below minimum 20 rejected on session create
preconditions: SessionService.create invoked under valid Instructor context
DTO sets gpsRadiusMeters to 10 (below 20–500 allowed range)
steps: Invoke SessionService.create with gpsRadiusMeters 10 and valid coordinates
Capture validation exception with OutOfRange error for gpsRadiusMeters
Query sessions table and confirm no row inserted
cases.expected: Radius below 20 m rejected per API design §5.2; no session row committed

cases.title: PATCH /sessions/:sessionId updates Draft GPS fields and returns 200
preconditions: Instructor owns a Draft session created without GPS coordinates
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: PATCH /sessions/:sessionId with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body reflects updated coordinates
GET /sessions/:sessionId and verify GPS fields persisted
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with updated Session DTO per API design §5.3; Draft session GPS fields updated for subsequent open

cases.title: Flow A step 2: Instructor creates session with GPS before opening check-in
preconditions: Roster seeded for HESD-01 / SWE-101 via prior CSV import (Flow A step 1)
Authenticated Instructor with assignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Workshop scheduledStart aligned to pilot timetable
steps: POST /sessions with class, subject, schedule, room name, and GPS coordinates (10.762622, 106.660172)
Assert session status Draft with gpsRadiusMeters 100
PATCH /sessions/:id if needed to confirm GPS fields valid
Proceed to POST /sessions/:id/open as Flow A step 3 continuation
cases.expected: Session created in Draft with valid GPS as Flow A prerequisite; ready for open transition and QR issuance in downstream steps

cases.title: Instructor creates session via SessionForm with GpsMapPicker and saves Draft
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Instructor navigates to session creation page for assigned class HESD-01
GpsMapPicker fixture coordinates available
steps: Fill SessionForm with class, subject, title, room name, and scheduled start
Select room location on GpsMapPicker map (latitude 10.762622, longitude 106.660172)
Verify gpsRadiusMeters defaults to 100 m in form
Click Lưu nháp (save draft) action
Verify success toast and session detail shows status Nháp (Draft) with GPS coordinates displayed
cases.expected: Session saved in Draft via UI per AC-04a; GPS coordinates visible on session detail; form reflects default 100 m radius

cases.title: Mở buổi học button disabled with inline GPS required message when coordinates missing
preconditions: Instructor is logged in and viewing a Draft session without room GPS configured
Instructor navigates to session settings tab (Cài đặt)
steps: Observe Mở buổi học (open session) action button state
Verify button is disabled or blocked
Verify inline error message requires room GPS configuration before opening check-in
Attempt to click open action and confirm no state change to Active
cases.expected: Open session UI blocked per AC-04b and BR-07; Vietnamese inline message prompts GPS configuration; session remains Draft

cases.title: Instructor cancels Draft session from session detail UI
preconditions: Instructor is logged in and owns a Draft session no longer needed
Instructor navigates to session detail page for the Draft session
steps: Click cancel session action (Hủy buổi học) on Draft session detail
Confirm cancellation in dialog prompt
Wait for navigation or status badge update
Verify session status badge shows Đã hủy (Cancelled) and open/QR actions are unavailable
cases.expected: Draft session cancelled via UI per AC-04c; terminal Cancelled status displayed; no further lifecycle actions available

cases.title: Parallel open attempts on Draft without GPS all reject; session remains Draft
preconditions: Draft session row exists with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open wired to real PostgreSQL with transaction isolation
Two concurrent callers use owning Instructor context for the same sessionId
steps: Launch two parallel SessionService.open(sessionId) invocations against the GPS-less Draft session
Await both calls to settle
Assert both reject with errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Query sessions table once and read status, opened_at columns
cases.expected: No partial Active transition under concurrent open; session status stays Draft with opened_at NULL; both failures surface RoomGpsRequired per AC-04b and BR-07

cases.title: WF-02: Create Draft session then PATCH room GPS before open
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Roster enrolled for class-subject pair per WF-02 step 2
steps: POST /sessions with classId, subjectId, title, roomName, and scheduledStart but omit roomLatitude and roomLongitude
Assert HTTP status 201 Created and response status Draft with null GPS fields
PATCH /sessions/:sessionId with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172
Assert HTTP status 200 with updated coordinates
GET /sessions/:sessionId and verify GPS fields persisted and status remains Draft
cases.expected: Two-step session preparation per WF-02 §3.2 completes in Draft with valid GPS; instructor ready to open check-in per AC-04a

cases.title: POST /sessions with roomLongitude out of range returns 422 OutOfRange
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with valid class-subject assignment
Session payload sets roomLongitude to 181 (exceeds −180..180 bounds)
steps: POST /sessions with roomLongitude 181 and otherwise valid fields including roomLatitude 10.762622
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed with field error code OutOfRange for roomLongitude
Verify no session row created
cases.expected: Invalid longitude rejected per API design §5.2 and validation rules §3.4; HTTP 422 with OutOfRange field error; no Draft session persisted
